title: Nextflow Pipeline Summary
description:
Structured per-source summary emitted by the summarize-nextflow Mold.

Per-source schema by design — paper, Nextflow, and CWL each have their own summary shape; downstream Molds (data flow, templates, tool wrappers) consume any source's summary and handle the polymorphism.

Field names mirror gxy-sketches' SketchSource / ToolSpec / TestDataRef / ExpectedOutputRef where parity exists; see docs/GXY_SKETCHES_ALIGNMENT.md.

Summary.title: Summary
Summary.description: Top-level shape. Every Nextflow summary is exactly this object.

warnings.description: Cast-skill-emitted advisory messages (e.g. DSL1 detected, meta.yml/script disagreement, lossy assertion summarization). Empty array on a clean run.

SourceRecord.title: SourceRecord
SourceRecord.description: Provenance block. Mirrors gxy-sketches SketchSource field names so a Foundry summary is structurally consumable by anyone using that shape.

ecosystem.description: Pipeline flavor. `nf-core` when `manifest.name` is `nf-core/<slug>` and the canonical layout is present; `nextflow` for ad-hoc DSL2 pipelines. Superset of gxy-sketches' enum (which adds `iwc`, `snakemake-workflows`, `wdl` for its other ingestors).

url.description: Git remote URL of the pipeline repository.

version.description: Tag, branch, or commit SHA the summary was derived from.

license.description: SPDX license identifier when detectable from a LICENSE file.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; `<owner>-<repo>` for nf-core, repo basename otherwise.

Param.title: Param
Param.description: One pipeline parameter. Sourced from `nextflow.config`'s `params { ... }` block, augmented from `nextflow_schema.json` when present (nf-core).

type.description: JSON Schema-style type when nextflow_schema.json supplies it (string, integer, number, boolean, path); free-form when inferred from a default value.

default.description: Default value verbatim from the source. May be null.

enum.description: Allowed values when nextflow_schema.json declares them.

Tool.title: Tool
Tool.description: One tool/dependency the pipeline runs. Mirrors gxy-sketches ToolSpec (name + version) and augments it with the resolved container/conda strings the bridge to author-galaxy-tool-wrapper needs.

name.description: Canonical tool name (e.g. `fastp`, `samtools`). Used as the foreign key from `processes[].tool`.

biocontainer.description: Resolved `quay.io/biocontainers/<name>:<version>--<build>` image string when a biocontainer reference was found.

bioconda.description: `bioconda::<name>=<version>` spec when a `conda` directive provides one.

docker.description: Other Docker registry image string (non-biocontainer) when present.

ChannelIO.title: ChannelIO
ChannelIO.description: One declared input or output channel of a process. Channel shape is a string, not a structured type — `tuple(meta, [path,path])` is enough for downstream Molds and avoids a research project on NF channel typing.

module_path.description: Relative path from the pipeline root to the file declaring the process.

tool.description: Foreign key into `tools[].name` when the process runs a single recognizable tool; null for multi-tool or pure-Groovy processes.

container.description: Resolved container image string verbatim from the process's `container` directive (or null).

when.description: Verbatim `when:` guard expression, or null if absent.

script_summary.description: One-line LLM-derived summary of what the `script:` body does. Free text.

publish_dir.description: `publishDir` value when the process publishes outputs (or null).

path.description: Relative path from the pipeline root.

calls.description: Names of processes and nested subworkflows this subworkflow invokes.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: One top-level channel constructed in the workflow. Sources include `Channel.fromPath`, `Channel.fromFilePairs`, `Channel.fromSamplesheet`, and `params.*`.

shape.description: String-encoded channel shape; same convention as ChannelIO.

Edge.title: Edge
Edge.description: One edge in the workflow's call graph. The deterministic parser records the literal operator chain in `via`; reconciliation of the source and target shapes is the LLM step.

to.description: Process or subworkflow name receiving this channel.

via.description: Operators on the path between source and target, in order (e.g. `["map", "join", "groupTuple"]`). Empty for a direct edge.

notes.description: LLM-emitted note when the reconciliation is low-confidence (e.g. deeply nested closures).

Conditional.title: Conditional
Conditional.description: One workflow-level conditional that gates a subgraph.

branch.description: Which side of the conditional this entry describes. `default` is the truthy branch; `alternate` is the else branch.

affects.description: Process or subworkflow names whose execution is gated by this conditional.

Workflow.title: Workflow
Workflow.description: Top-level workflow: channel construction plus the call-graph DAG.

TestDataRef.title: TestDataRef
TestDataRef.description: One test-fixture input. Field names mirror gxy-sketches' TestDataRef verbatim. The sketch-bundle constraint that `path` must live under `test_data/` is intentionally dropped; the Foundry summary describes fixtures as data, it does not bundle them.

path.description: Repo-relative path when the fixture lives in-tree.

sha1.description: SHA-1 integrity hash when published alongside the fixture.

ExpectedOutputRef.title: ExpectedOutputRef
ExpectedOutputRef.description: One expected output. Field names mirror gxy-sketches' ExpectedOutputRef verbatim. At least one of path / url / assertions is required.

assertions.description: Assertion strings. Simple equality / regex / contains-string checks are preserved verbatim; complex Groovy assertions are summarized to prose with a `warnings[]` flag in the parent Summary.

TestFixtures.title: TestFixtures
TestFixtures.description: Test fixtures derived from a `conf/<profile>.config` and any nf-test fixtures under `tests/`.
